page_metadata.biotools__summary: The tool contains classes and methods to help the analysis of whole genome association studies. It utilizes S4 classes and extends haplo.stats R package to facilitate haplotype analyses. The package is useful to carry out most common analysis when performing whole genome association studies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The tool contains classes and methods to help the analysis of whole genome association studies. It utilizes S4 classes and extends haplo.stats R package to facilitate haplotype analyses. The package is useful to carry out most common analysis when performing whole genome association studies.
